items.raw_excerpt: Das Eurovision Village am Wiener Rathausplatz startet am 10. Mai mit Bühne, Public Viewing und Türkisem Teppich. Alle Infos zum ESC-Hotspot.
items.summary_en: Vienna is preparing a Eurovision Village at Rathausplatz starting May 10, with a stage, public viewing, and a turquoise carpet. The city is positioning the square as a central fan hub for the ESC event.
items.title_en: Vienna Builds Eurovision Village for 100,000 Fans
items.title_original: „Die Stadt ist bereit“: Wien baut ESC-Dorf für 100.000 Fans - vienna.at

items.raw_excerpt: Il nostro racconto del Tuscany Trail tra entusiasmo, tanta fatica e quel pizzico di avventura che dà sapore a questo evento.
items.summary_en: BiciDaStrada shares a personal account of riding the Tuscany Trail, describing the enthusiasm, fatigue, and sense of adventure around the event. The piece focuses on the human experience of taking part rather than major competitive results.
items.title_en: My Tuscany Trail: an adventure that demanded a lot and gave back even more
items.title_original: Il "mio" Tuscany Trail: un'avventura che ci ha chiesto tanto e restituito di più... - BiciDaStrada

items.raw_excerpt: オリックス・ホテルマネジメント株式会社のプレスリリース（2025年7月25日 14時00分）８月限定 産地直送の夏のおいしさで、地域を体験「日本で最も美しい村」北海道・赤井川村フェア開催【クロスホテル札幌】
items.summary_en: Cross Hotel Sapporo will hold a limited August fair showcasing summer foods delivered directly from Akaigawa Village in Hokkaido. The event highlights the village, known as one of Japan's most beautiful villages, through regional flavors and local produce.
items.title_en: Cross Hotel Sapporo to Host August-Only Akaigawa Village Fair Featuring Direct-from-Producer Summer Foods
items.title_original: ８月限定 産地直送の夏のおいしさで、地域を体験「日本で最も美しい村」北海道・赤井川村フェア開催【クロスホテル札幌】 - PR TIMES

items.raw_excerpt: The Village Coffee & Music in Utrecht.
items.summary_en: The Village Coffee & Music is a coffee spot in Utrecht located in the old Wolvenplein prison. The Sprudge feature highlights its unusual mix of specialty coffee, music, and a heavy metal atmosphere in a historic local setting.
items.title_en: Heavy Metal Coffee in an Old Dutch Prison at The Village Wolvenplein
items.title_original: Heavy Metal Coffee In An Old Dutch Prison At The Village Wolvenplein - Sprudge

items.raw_excerpt: San Miguel de Allende fue distinguida como ‘La Ciudad Número Número 1 de México y el Mundo’ por Travel and Leisure, convirtiéndose así en el destino por excelencia de turistas nacionales y extranjeros
items.summary_en: San Miguel de Allende was recognized by Travel + Leisure as the number one city in Mexico and the world. The honor positions the small Mexican city as a standout destination for both domestic and international travelers.
items.title_en: Travel + Leisure Names San Miguel de Allende the World's Best Small City
items.title_original: Travel and Leisure nombra a San Miguel de Allende mejor ciudad pequeña del mundo - Código Magenta

items.raw_excerpt: Germany is home to countless beautiful villages. Here are eight of The Local's recommendations for some of the most charming ones to visit this summer for a day trip or as part of a longer tour.
items.summary_en: The Local Germany highlights eight charming villages across Germany that may be worth visiting in summer. The piece is a travel recommendation list rather than a specific news event, focused on small scenic destinations for day trips or longer tours.
items.title_en: Eight of the most beautiful German villages to visit this summer
items.title_original: Eight of the most beautiful German villages to visit this summer

items.raw_excerpt: Todas as informações das rádios Nacional e MEC passam a estar disponíveis em dois ambientes exclusivos: radionacional.ebc.com.br e radiomec.ebc.com.br
items.summary_en: Brazil's EBC is launching dedicated websites for Radio Nacional and Radio MEC this Wednesday. The new pages will gather all information for the two stations in separate online spaces.
items.title_en: EBC launches new websites for Nacional and MEC radio stations
items.title_original: EBC lança novos sites das rádios Nacional e MEC nesta quarta-feira

items.raw_excerpt: «Last Train, di gamle hore. Jeg elsker deg», skriver «huspsykolog» Pål Erik Gulliksrud i boka oppkalt etter baren.
items.summary_en: Avisa Oslo profiles Last Train, a legendary Oslo bar that has drawn well-known visitors and stayed alive for more than four decades. A new book named after the bar includes affectionate, rough-edged tributes from people connected to it.
items.title_en: Oslo's Legendary Last Train Bar Has Survived for Over 40 Years
items.title_original: Store stjerner vanker her. Den legendariske baren har overlevd i over 40 år: – Umulig å drepe - Avisa Oslo

items.raw_excerpt: In one of her first summers in Denmark, Rushnan Binte Amin spent an entire week discovering the country through six separate day trips from Copenhagen. It changed the way she saw her adopted home.
items.summary_en: Rushnan Binte Amin spent one of her first summers in Denmark taking six separate day trips from Copenhagen in a single week. The experience changed how she understood and felt about her adopted home.
items.title_en: One week, six breaks: How I discovered Denmark through day trips
items.title_original: One week, six breaks: How I discovered Denmark through day trips

items.raw_excerpt: Karistaessaan pääkaupungin tomut jaloistaan suuntaavat monet helsinkiläiset mökille – Helsinkiin! Talvisaikaan Taivassalossa sijaitseva Helsinki on kuuden asukkaan uinuva kylä, mutta kesäisin sen väkimäärä moninkertaistuu.
items.summary_en: Many residents of Finland's capital head to their summer cottages in a place also called Helsinki. In winter, this Helsinki in Taivassalo is a sleepy village of six residents, but its population multiplies in summer.
items.title_en: Summer cottage-goers fill the tiny Helsinki in Taivassalo
items.title_original: Mökkihelsinkiläiset täyttävät kesällä Helsingin - Yle

items.raw_excerpt: L’arrivée de la 1re et le départ de la deuxième étape de la Solitaire du Figaro Paprec se feront à Roscoff (Finistère). Pour l’occasion, du 10 au 14 septembre 2025, le port du Bloscon va se transformer en village foisonnant d’animations. Visite de bateaux, balades en mer, marché de producteurs, découverte des métiers de la Brittany Ferries… Voici le programme !
items.summary_en: Roscoff will host the arrival of the first stage and the departure of the second stage of the Solitaire du Figaro Paprec. From September 10 to 14, 2025, the Port du Bloscon will become a lively village with boat visits, sea trips, a producers' market, and Brittany Ferries job showcases.
items.title_en: Solitaire du Figaro Paprec stopover brings festivities to Roscoff
items.title_original: La Solitaire du Figaro Paprec fait escale à Roscoff, qui sera en fête du 10 au 14 septembre - Ouest-France

items.raw_excerpt: Ludlow held the first of four hearings related to the merger of the town and village on Thursday, Feb. 12, at the Ludlow Town Hall.
items.summary_en: Ludlow held the first of four public hearings about a proposed merger between the town and village. The hearing took place on Thursday, February 12, at Ludlow Town Hall.
items.title_en: Ludlow Holds Town and Village Merger Hearings
items.title_original: Ludlow holds town and village merger hearings - The Vermont Journal & The Shopper -

items.raw_excerpt: Fans of Maná, the most successful Latin American band of all time, are gearing up for a free outdoor concert in Guadalajara Wednesday night.
items.summary_en: Fans of Maná are preparing for a free outdoor concert in Guadalajara. The band plans to donate World Cup concert proceeds to reforestation projects in Guadalajara and Puerto Vallarta.
items.title_en: Maná to donate World Cup concert proceeds to reforesting Guadalajara and Puerto Vallarta
items.title_original: Maná to donate World Cup concert proceeds to reforesting Guadalajara and Puerto Vallarta

items.raw_excerpt: A estação pluviométrica do Sistema Alerta Rio na região anotou, das 12h de segunda-feira (15) até a tarde desta terça-feira (16), 254,6 milímetros (mm) de chuva. Tal volume é 146,1 mm superior à média para junho (108,5 mm).
items.summary_en: A rain gauge from Rio's alert system recorded 254.6 mm of rain in Rocinha from midday Monday to Tuesday afternoon. That was 146.1 mm above the area's June average of 108.5 mm.
items.title_en: Rain in Rocinha was more than twice the June average
items.title_original: Chuva na Rocinha superou em mais que duas vezes a média de junho

items.raw_excerpt: À Manchester, une Américaine a lancé une cagnotte après avoir vu un livreur DoorDash de 78 ans peiner à livrer un café. La collecte a finalement atteint un niveau bien plus élevé que prévu.
items.summary_en: In Manchester, an American woman started a fundraiser after seeing a 78-year-old DoorDash driver struggle to deliver a coffee. The campaign grew far beyond expectations and raised $800,000 to help him retire.
items.title_en: Woman raises $800,000 to help 78-year-old DoorDash driver retire
items.title_original: « Il mérite de se reposer » : une Américaine récolte 800 000 dollars pour envoyer à la retraite un livreur de 78 ans - Le Tribunal du Net

items.raw_excerpt: Youssef Asad Alkhatib arrived as a teenager nearly a decade ago, now he's a trained actor with plans to take on major Finnish roles.
items.summary_en: Youssef Asad Alkhatib arrived in Finland as a teenager nearly a decade ago. He is now a trained actor and hopes to take on major Finnish roles.
items.title_en: Finland's Refugee of the Year is an actor with big ambitions
items.title_original: Finland's Refugee of the Year is an actor with big ambitions

items.raw_excerpt: Trousdale's General Store is one of those gems that has truly stood the test of time, outlasting even some of Canada's department stores.
items.summary_en: Trousdale's General Store is described as a long-running local gem that has stood the test of time. The story highlights its unusual endurance, even outlasting some Canadian department stores.
items.title_en: Canada's Oldest General Store Is in a Small Ontario Village
items.title_original: Canada’s oldest general store is found in this small Ontario village - curiocity.com

items.raw_excerpt: 3/4土曜日、札幌駅前通りと北3条通りが交差するスポットに新しく誕生する「札幌フコク生命越山ビル」。このビルの地下1階か…
items.summary_en: A new spot called Sitatte Sapporo is opening in the Sapporo Fukoku Seimei Koshiyama Building near the intersection of Sapporo Ekimae-dori and Kita 3-jo-dori. The venue features shops making their first appearance in Hokkaido and a series of limited menu items.
items.title_en: Sitatte Sapporo Opens With Hokkaido-First Shops and Limited Menus
items.title_original: sitatte sapporo(シタッテサッポロ)、道内初出店＆限定メニューもぞくぞく！ - ウォーカープラス

items.raw_excerpt: Expanding the pre-existing Brusels-Strasbourg route in a trail run, Basel could soon have a direct train link with Brussels.
items.summary_en: Switzerland is set to test an extension of an existing Brussels-Strasbourg rail service that could give Basel a direct train link to Brussels. The trial would add a useful cross-border connection for travelers in northwest Switzerland.
items.title_en: Switzerland to Test Basel-Brussels Train Route
items.title_original: Switzerland to test Basel-Brussels train route

items.raw_excerpt: FRANKLIN COUNTY — With age comes breakdowns.
items.summary_en: A Franklin County story looks at how aging public utilities and inflation are shaping local development pressures. It raises the question of when infrastructure-driven growth becomes too much for a community.
items.title_en: Inflation Meets Infrastructure: Public Utilities Drive Development in Franklin County
items.title_original: Inflation meets infrastructure; Public utilities drive development, but when is too much too much? - St. Albans Messenger
